mnemonics.title: Multiple = Many Xs
mnemonics.content: Simple: Y = b0 + b1(X). Multiple: Y = b0 + b1(X1) + b2(X2) + ... Multiple predictors, one target.

mnemonics.title: VIF = Variance Inflation Factor
mnemonics.content: VIF < 5: OK. VIF 5-10: Moderate concern. VIF > 10: Serious multicollinearity. Remove or combine correlated features.

mnemonics.title: R-sq vs Adj R-sq
mnemonics.content: R-squared: always goes up with more features (like a score that only rewards). Adjusted R-squared: penalizes bad features (fair judge).

mnemonics.title: OLS Formula
mnemonics.content: b = (X'X)^-1 X'Y - 'Transpose, Multiply, Invert, Transpose, Multiply' - the OLS coefficient solution.

mnemonics.title: Ceteris Paribus
mnemonics.content: Each coefficient bi = effect on Y when Xi changes by 1, with ALL other Xs held constant. Partial effect, not total effect.
